## General Checklist
<!-- Approve following, checking it out with an [X]: -->
<!-- Подтвердите все пункты, поставив [X]: -->
* [ ] I confirm that this contribution is my own work or that I have permission to submit it.
* [ ] I understand that this contribution may be modified, adapted, or redistributed as part of this project.
* [ ] I agree that this contribution will remain available in the project under the repository license(s).

## If contributing code
<!-- IF CONTRIBUTING CODE: Approve following, checking it out with an [X]: -->
<!-- ЕСЛИ ЗАЛИВАЕТЕ КОД: Подтвердите все пункты, поставив [X]: -->

## If contributing artwork / sprites / textures / sounds / etc.
<!-- IF CONTRIBUTING ARTWORK: Approve following, checking it out with an [X]: -->
<!-- ЕСЛИ ЗАЛИВАЕТЕ ТВОРЧЕСКУЮ РАБОТУ: Подтвердите все пункты, поставив [X]: -->
* [ ] I created this artwork myself or have permission to contribute it.
* [ ] I agree that this artwork will be included in the project under **CC BY-SA 4.0**.
* [ ] I understand that the artwork may be modified, recolored, resized, edited, or adapted for project needs.
* [ ] I understand that previously accepted contributions cannot be retroactively revoked from already released versions of the project.
